title: Naked Paper Bamboo Facial Tissues - 12 Boxes, 100 Soft & Strong 2-Ply Tissues per Box, Unbleached & Chemical-Free for Sensitive Skin, Sustainable Bamboo Tissue Box
features: SUSTAINABLE SOFTNESS - Treat yourself to ultimate luxury without compromise - these bamboo tissues in plastic-free packaging are strong yet gentle for high performance without hurting the planet

SENSITIVE SKIN FRIENDLY- Ultra-soft, unbleached & crafted without harsh chemicals, these natural coloured bamboo tissues are ideal for delicate skin to use as face wipes without irritation or soreness
AMPLE TISSUE SUPPLY - see the season through with bulk buy tissues - each box contains 100 2-ply tissues, providing plenty of serviettes for illness or allergies so you can catch that runny nose
NATURAL MATERIALS - harnessing the renewable properties of bamboo, this toilet tissue has a low carbon footprint, is safe for use around little ones, and also degrades easily to help the environment

CONSCIOUS WITHOUT COMPROMISE - Naked Paper breaks tradition by producing sustainable tissues without harmful chemicals or plastic, providing better, high-performing products for both you and the earth
description: Sustainably Soft and Strong Indulge in the luxurious softness of our bamboo tissues while embracing an environmentally conscious choice. Unlike traditional paper napkins, these unbleached beauties boast a chic, natural hue. With 100 sturdy 2-ply tissues per box, you'll have ample supply for your tissue box holder or car tissues needs. Crafted from bamboo and free from harsh chemicals, they're ideal for sensitive skin. Conscious Convenience Prioritise sustainability without sacrificing convenience. Our large packs of tissues are ideal for on-the-go living. Tuck them into your pushchair, car or desk drawer for easy access to soft, strong tissues wherever you go. With our commitment to renewable energy and fossil fuel-free production, you can feel good about your choice. Bulk Up on Quality Our bulk buy tissues ensure you're always stocked up on these sustainable essentials. No more last-minute dashes to the store when you've got the sniffles, simply stock up and enjoy the softness and strength of our bamboo tissue boxes. -FSC bamboo from responsibly managed forests -Super soft and strong 2-ply -100 tissues per box -Unbleached
